MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,961.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN  FRANCISCO . AS TO DEFENDANT THE SOJOURNER TRUTH FORSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.50 - SERVED NOV-19-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE SOJOURNER TRUTH FORSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY REPRESENTED JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SOJOURNER TRUTH FORSTER FAMILY SERVICE AGENCY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALMA JACKSON, FOUNDER CEO AND CARLETTA JACKSON -LANE EXECUTIVE DIRECTOR. HONORABLE JUDGE VAN AKEN FINDS THE CLAIM IS BEYOND THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED.
